channel.title: hugo on Rasmus Kronberg

item.title: Welcome!
item.description: Hello and welcome to my personal website/portfolio/blog! I’m Rasmus, a Finnish computational chemist pursuing a doctoral degree at Aalto University. This website will serve as a platform showcasing my background and interests, past and ongoing research projects and perhaps some more extensive blog posts in case I have something on my mind I think would be worth sharing. Stay tuned! This site is made with Hugo, an (extremely!) fast and flexible open-source static site generator, and hosted through GitHub pages.
